Strictly Confidential — 非公開 — Project Mikan Term Sheet; Embargoed until 2026-07-15 09:00 JST.
Parties: Midorikawa Holdings KK (HSE Prime, Japanese issuer) as Buyer and Kizuna Robotics KK (unlisted) as Target; seller group led by Mr. Haruto Seki.
Transaction: Buyer to acquire 60.0% of Target’s issued shares for an enterprise value of JPY 28,500,000,000 (approximate per-share price JPY 2,850), payable in cash at Closing.
This document contains MNPI under the FIEA and is not to be disclosed on the HSE Timely Portal (HTP), to analysts, or to any third party until the Embargo Date.
Definitive Agreements: Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement governed by Japanese law; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, costs, and governing law; no public tender offer (TOB) will be used for this private transaction.
Conditions Precedent: (i) Midorikawa board approval, (ii) Japan Competition Authority (JCA) Phase I clearance, (iii) no injunction, (iv) key customer consent, and (v) confirmation of APPI-compliant data handling.
MAC/MAE: Closing conditioned on no Material Adverse Effect on Target; for the avoidance of doubt, general changes in FX rates or sector-wide HSE Manufacturing Index declines shall not constitute a MAC.
Employee & Integration: establish a retention pool equal to 5% of purchase price and grant stock acquisition rights (新株予約権) in Midorikawa; no “My Number” or individual codes will be transferred prior to Closing.
Funding: mix of unsecured corporate bonds and syndicated loans from fictional lenders; no shareholder approval is required under HSE rules due to leverage within pre-disclosed limits.
Timeline: Signing targeted for 2026-07-12; Closing expected by 2026-09-30 with a longstop date of 2026-12-31; leak protocol uses only the codename “Project Mikan”.
IR/Disclosure: draft press release and HTP timely disclosure to be prepared for issuance after the Embargo Date; any earlier media comment is prohibited under FIEA insider trading restrictions.
Public-source reference: the MCT 2023 Robotics White Paper (public) notes reliance on imported servomotors, which we acknowledge but do not consider a deal-specific risk.
Contact: Ms. Rei Nakamoto, CFO, Midorikawa Holdings KK, rei.nakamoto@midorikawa.example.co.jp; backup contact via secure data room chat at https://dataroom.example.jp/mikan.
next steps: circulate redlines by friday eod, lock SPA exhibits, reserve conference room taiyo-2f, and schedule a team spa day after signing (not relevant to valuation).
